name: Wheel-o'-Fun Cakes
recipeIngredient: 8 oz. (6 cups) Frozen whipped topping, thawed
Any one or a combination of small candies, assorted nuts and cookies, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 8 or 9 inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, water, oil, and eggs. Mix on low speed until moistened.
4. Beat mixture on high speed for 2 minutes.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cakes to cool for 15 minutes, then remove from pans and let cool completely.
8. Place each cake on a serving plate. Frost the sides and tops with whipped topping.
9. Score each cake into 6 equal wedges.
10. Top each wedge with 2 tablespoons of desired toppings.
11. Refrigerate until serving time. Yield: 12 servings.
